title: Complete internal QA and release readiness review
description: Run smoke/regression checks and resolve launch blockers before release.
acceptance_criteria: Release candidate passes agreed quality gates.

title: Package distributable build with empty EmulatorData
description: Produce cooked build and verify no copyrighted ROM content is bundled.
acceptance_criteria: Distribution package is legally clean and functional.

title: Write end-user README and legal disclaimer
description: Document setup, troubleshooting, controls, and legal requirements for user-supplied files.
acceptance_criteria: New user can complete setup without developer assistance.

title: Run performance and memory optimization pass
description: Profile CPU, GPU, and memory; fix bottlenecks in rendering, audio, and threading.
acceptance_criteria: Performance targets are met on target hardware tier.

title: Execute broad compatibility test matrix
description: Run test passes across varied Amiga titles and record compatibility outcomes.
acceptance_criteria: High-priority compatibility blockers are resolved or documented.

title: Implement gamepad remapping user flow
description: Provide remapping UI and persistence for profile-specific controller bindings.
acceptance_criteria: Remaps persist and apply correctly in emulator mode.

title: Implement first-launch setup and missing ROM guidance
description: Detect absent Kickstart/ROM paths and display legal setup instructions.
acceptance_criteria: First-run path clearly guides user to complete configuration.

title: Build pause and settings UMG interface
description: Implement resume, CRT settings, audio volume, input mapping, return, and quit controls.
acceptance_criteria: All planned controls are accessible and functional.

title: Validate input compatibility across game archetypes
description: Run regression passes against keyboard, mouse, and joystick-centric Amiga titles.
acceptance_criteria: No critical control regressions across test suite.

title: Implement runtime INI configuration reader
description: Load core path, ROM path, region, CRT toggle, volume, and input profile settings.
acceptance_criteria: Settings apply on startup without recompilation.

title: Implement gamepad mapping and analog-to-digital conversion
description: Map sticks/buttons to Amiga joystick keys with deadzone and diagonal support.
acceptance_criteria: Gamepad controls are responsive across tested games.

title: Add mouse confinement and cursor policy
description: Hide/confine cursor in emulator mode and restore behavior in environment mode.
acceptance_criteria: Mouse cannot escape window during emulator interaction.

title: Implement pause and return-to-room flow
description: Handle Escape pause menu and mode reversal while emulator keeps running.
acceptance_criteria: Exit path restores player control without stuck inputs.

title: Build cabinet interaction and camera transition flow
description: Implement approach prompt, interact action, and camera lerp to cabinet anchor.
acceptance_criteria: Entering emulator mode feels smooth and deterministic.

title: Author Enhanced Input contexts for two modes
description: Create IMC_Environment and IMC_Emulator mapping contexts and action assets.
acceptance_criteria: Context swap cleanly changes active controls.

title: Implement URetroScreenInputBridge core
description: Create bridge class managing shared atomic input states for emulator polling.
acceptance_criteria: Bridge exposes stable keyboard, mouse, and gamepad state to core.

title: Profile integration performance and optimize hotspots
description: Measure texture upload, audio callback, and thread scheduling costs in UE.
acceptance_criteria: Integration meets initial latency and frame-rate targets.

title: Implement procedural audio bridge with SPSC ring buffer
description: Feed emulator PCM into lock-free buffer consumed by USoundWaveProcedural or synth path.
acceptance_criteria: Audio remains synchronized and under latency target.

title: Create baseline screen material and test plane
description: Apply dynamic texture to simple unlit material on a scene plane for verification.
acceptance_criteria: Playable game output appears in UE scene.

title: Upload frames to UTexture2DDynamic
description: Create dynamic texture pipeline and per-frame update path for emulator output.
acceptance_criteria: In-game texture updates at emulator cadence with low overhead.

title: Implement double-buffered video bridge
description: Capture core frames into staging buffers and coordinate producer-consumer swapping.
acceptance_criteria: No tearing or race-condition artifacts in captured frames.

title: Run emulator core on FRunnableThread
description: Move emulator run loop off game thread with proper synchronization boundaries.
acceptance_criteria: Game thread remains responsive while emulator runs.

title: Implement ARetroScreenManager lifecycle actor
description: Create manager actor owning startup, shutdown, and high-level state orchestration.
acceptance_criteria: Manager can initialize and teardown emulator safely.

title: Create RetroScreen UE5 C++ module scaffolding
description: Add module structure and build configuration for runtime emulator integration.
acceptance_criteria: Module compiles and loads in editor.

title: Document Phase 1 benchmark results
description: Publish performance and compatibility findings to guide UE integration decisions.
acceptance_criteria: Benchmark report is shared and accepted.

title: Capture timing and CPU metrics
description: Measure frame pacing and CPU cost under representative load.
acceptance_criteria: PAL target maintains stable 50fps on mid-range hardware.

title: Load Kickstart and ADF into harness
description: Wire runtime loading paths for Kickstart ROM and game disk image.
acceptance_criteria: Selected test game boots successfully.

title: Implement libretro input callbacks
description: Implement input polling/state callbacks and keyboard forwarding.
acceptance_criteria: Game receives expected control input.

title: Implement libretro audio callback
description: Implement retro_set_audio_sample_batch callback and output to local audio device.
acceptance_criteria: Audio plays without stutter during gameplay.

title: Implement libretro video callback
description: Implement retro_set_video_refresh callback and frame capture path for display.
acceptance_criteria: Frames render consistently in test window.

title: Implement libretro environment callback
description: Implement retro_set_environment callback handling capabilities and pixel format negotiation.
acceptance_criteria: Core initializes successfully with expected environment responses.

title: Create standalone C++ libretro harness
description: Set up a small executable that loads libretro core DLL at runtime.
acceptance_criteria: Harness starts and resolves required retro symbols.

title: Phase 5: Polish, configuration, and release prep
description: Finalize UX, configuration surfaces, QA, optimization, and distribution packaging.
acceptance_criteria: Non-technical user can configure and play with documented setup path.

title: Phase 3: Input and interaction flow
description: Implement environment/emulator mode switching and full input passthrough mappings.
acceptance_criteria: Player can enter and exit cabinet mode and play using keyboard, mouse, and gamepad.

title: Phase 2: Unreal Engine integration
description: Integrate emulator runtime into UE5 with threaded execution, texture output, and procedural audio.
acceptance_criteria: In-game plane displays emulator output with synchronized low-latency audio.

title: Phase 1: Emulator core proof of concept
description: Validate libretro Amiga core operation in a standalone harness outside Unreal Engine.
acceptance_criteria: Standalone harness runs Amiga game with stable frame rate, audio, and keyboard input.

title: Phase 0: Foundation and prerequisites
description: Establish required toolchain, runtime assets, and baseline project configuration before emulator implementation.
acceptance_criteria: Team can build UE C++ project and has legal test assets ready.
notes:
Sprint 1 kickoff started on 2026-05-05. Issue moved to in_progress.
Claim normalized during Sprint 1 kickoff on 2026-05-05.

title: RetroScreen v1.0 implementation program
description: Deliver the full RetroScreen v1.0 scope from overview, TDD, input, art, and implementation plan documents.
acceptance_criteria: All planned phases are complete with acceptance criteria met and release package ready.

title: Add screen-linked supplementary rect light
description: Drive a cabinet light from average screen luminance/color for dynamic ambience.
acceptance_criteria: Light response tracks screen content without flicker artifacts.

title: Add environmental audio layers
description: Integrate room tone, hum, and ambient loops distinct from emulator audio source.
acceptance_criteria: Environment sounds cohesive and non-intrusive.

title: Implement lighting with emissive CRT contribution
description: Tune Lumen setup and supplemental lights for believable cabinet glow.
acceptance_criteria: Screen illumination visibly affects nearby geometry.

title: Build arcade room environment layout
description: Assemble room shell, props, signage, and spatial composition around hero cabinet.
acceptance_criteria: Environment meets target atmosphere and traversal needs.

title: Expose CRT parameters via dynamic material instance
description: Make runtime-adjustable parameters for quality and accessibility tuning.
acceptance_criteria: Parameters can be changed at runtime and in pause menu.

title: Implement CRT material core effects
description: Build scanlines, curvature, phosphor bloom, vignette, and chromatic aberration controls.
acceptance_criteria: CRT effect visually matches design intent.

title: Author cabinet UVs and material slots
description: Prepare slots for body, bezel, screen, controls, side art, coin door, and marquee.
acceptance_criteria: Material assignment supports runtime screen texture injection.

title: Create or source arcade cabinet hero asset
description: Model/adapt cabinet mesh with required dimensions and legal originality constraints.
acceptance_criteria: Cabinet asset is approved and import-ready.

title: Define architecture and coding conventions
description: Lock naming, threading, and module boundaries for manager and bridge classes before implementation.
acceptance_criteria: Team follows agreed conventions and module layout in source tree.

title: Prepare baseline Amiga ADF test suite
description: Collect multiple ADFs for keyboard-only, mouse-only, and joystick-heavy validation.
acceptance_criteria: At least three representative ADFs are cataloged for QA.

title: Prepare legal Kickstart ROM test asset
description: Provision user-supplied Kickstart ROM file for local testing only.
acceptance_criteria: Kickstart path is available and validated by startup checks.

title: Obtain and verify PUAE libretro core DLL
description: Acquire compatible PUAE core build and validate licensing constraints for project usage.
acceptance_criteria: Core binary loads in a test loader and license notes are recorded.

title: Install and verify Unreal Engine 5.4+ C++ toolchain
description: Prepare UE5.4+ and native build prerequisites for Windows and optional Linux target.
acceptance_criteria: Clean C++ project build succeeds from command line and editor.
notes:
Sprint 1 kickoff started on 2026-05-05. Issue moved to in_progress.
Claim normalized during Sprint 1 kickoff on 2026-05-05.

title: Phase 4: Art, environment, and CRT presentation
description: Build final cabinet asset, arcade room, CRT shader, and environmental audiovisual immersion.
acceptance_criteria: Scene quality and CRT presentation meet v1.0 art-direction goals.
